controls.name: Access Control Management
controls.description: Implement role-based access controls (RBAC) across all systems. Users are granted minimum necessary privileges based on their role. Access is reviewed quarterly.

controls.name: Network Security and Segmentation
controls.description: Network policies enforce micro-segmentation between application tiers. Cross-namespace traffic is restricted. All inter-service communication is encrypted with mTLS.

controls.name: Encryption at Rest and in Transit
controls.description: All data is encrypted using AES-256 at rest and TLS 1.2+ in transit. Database connections use SSL. Secrets are managed through HashiCorp Vault with auto-rotation.

controls.name: Vulnerability Management
controls.description: Automated vulnerability scanning runs on every code push. Container images are scanned before deployment. Critical and high vulnerabilities must be resolved within 48 hours.

controls.name: Intrusion Detection and Prevention
controls.description: WAF rules block common attack vectors including XSS, SQLi, XXE, and prototype pollution. DDoS protection is active at L3/L4 and L7. SIEM provides real-time threat monitoring.

controls.name: Audit Logging and Monitoring
controls.description: All system actions are logged with structured audit trails. Logs include user identity, action performed, timestamp, and source IP. Kubernetes audit policy captures secrets access and RBAC changes.

controls.name: Secrets Management
controls.description: All application secrets are stored in HashiCorp Vault. No secrets exist in source code or environment variables. Secret rotation is automated with maximum TTL of 720 hours.

controls.name: Incident Response Plan
controls.description: Documented incident response procedures with defined severity levels, escalation paths, and communication plans. Regular tabletop exercises are conducted quarterly.

controls.name: High Availability Architecture
controls.description: Application is deployed across multiple availability zones with pod anti-affinity rules. Health checks ensure automatic failover. SLA target is 99.9% uptime.

controls.name: Backup and Disaster Recovery
controls.description: Automated daily database backups with 30-day retention. Disaster recovery procedures tested quarterly. Recovery Time Objective (RTO) is 4 hours, Recovery Point Objective (RPO) is 1 hour.

controls.name: Data Classification and Handling
controls.description: Data is classified into Public, Internal, Confidential, and Restricted categories. PII is redacted in audit logs. Financial data is tagged as PCI-scope.

controls.name: Multi-Factor Authentication
controls.description: MFA is enforced for all administrative access. Cloudflare Zero Trust requires MFA for admin panel access. Service tokens are used for internal API authentication.
